response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack and web developer with broad language experience and strong software craftsmanship practices, but the role requires deep hardware-level expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, and hardware-software co-design. Aside from brief C/C++ IDE component work at National Instruments and low-latency DLang services at Dunnhumby, there is no evidence of computer architecture, GPU/accelerator, SIMD/MIMD, or deep-learning workload optimization experience, which are core to this principal-level position.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career (15+ years) meeting the BS + 8 years experience bar
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, open-source authorship, and community teaching
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, silicon, or hardware architecture experience
No AI accelerator, GPU workload, or deep-learning training/inference optimization background
Career trajectory is web/product engineering, not performance architecture at principal level

key_factors.factor: No AI/DL workload or accelerator experience
